title: hyptis velutina var. neglecta
intro: Hyptis velutina var. neglecta, also known as a type of wild hyssop, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Hyptis velutina var. neglecta include its use in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its therapeutic properties.
